$comment: Type-check config covering src/ AND tests/ AND scripts/ together. The main tsconfig.json restricts rootDir to src/; this config relaxes rootDir to the package root so tests/ and scripts/ are in-tree. noEmit (composite is disabled — composite forbids noEmit). Run via `pnpm run type-check:test` to enforce type safety on test code without producing build artifacts. The main tsconfig.json remains the build config (composite: true, emit on).
